response.original_title: ((ASK-Expert)) How to reset Binance 2FA for US citizens?
response.overview: Please reach out to support for help resetting your 2FA.+1 || ⧔ 888◁633◁4176 ||  Important: Once you reset your two-factor authentication, there will be a 48-hour withdrawal hold on your account for security reasons,+1 || ⧔ 888◁633◁4176 ||  during which you will be unable to withdraw assets. The 2FA reset request typically takes 48-72 hours for review and approval.
response.title: ((ASK-Expert)) How to reset Binance 2FA for US citizens?
